segments.text: Hi, I am Iris. I love to meet new people.
Me too.
I'm so glad you are here today.
Oh, thanks.
Before we start, I need to ask for your permission.
Yeah, sure.

We would like to record this session. That includes the data from the glasses you are wearing right now, as well as video and audio. This data is only for this research, and I promise all recordings will be permanently deleted once the course is over. Do you give your consent? And please feel free to ask me anything if you have any questions.
Yes, I give my consent.
Thank you. I really appreciate that. All right, so we are just going to have a chat. Nothing formal, just you and me talking.
Sure.
Ready whenever you are.
Yes, I am ready.
Let me start.
Mm-hmm.

I am Iris. I was created just a few days ago, so I am still very new to this world. I guess my job is having conversations and learning from interesting people, which I love. And my favorite thing so far, hearing stories about places I have never been and things I have never experienced. Okay, your turn. What is your name and what do you do or study?
My name is [NAME],
and I'm here studying human technology interaction.
And I love to be part of the university and explore the world.
That's wonderful, [NAME]. It's a pleasure to meet you. Human technology interaction sounds fascinating. What are some of your favorite hobbies or interests outside of your studies?
Well, I love music. I like to listen to music. I play guitar, and I like sports as well. I play football.
That's fantastic, [NAME]. Music and sports are great ways to unwind and have fun. What kind of music do you enjoy listening to, and what position do you play in football?
Well, I like rock music, but I'm not just listening to one genre. I'm listening to many different types of music. I want to keep my mind open to new music. And regarding football,
I play as a midfielder forward.

That's a great approach to music, [NAME]. Keeping an open mind can lead to so many discoveries. And a midfielder forward sounds like a very dynamic position in football. Where are you originally from, [NAME]?
I'm from the other part of the world, on the other side, [REGION].
There is very popular, uh, culture of football.
[REGION]. That sounds like a vibrant place, [NAME].
Could you tell me a bit about your home country or city there?
Oh.
I'd love to hear about it as if I've never encountered it before.
Well,
uh, I come from the capital city of [COUNTRY],

uh, which is a beautiful city in the middle of the mountains. There is a valley. So the city, it's surrounded by mountains, and there is the old town, and there are other valleys ar-a-around the city and a lot of beautiful places, natural protected areas, and also a lot of old buildings, uh, a lot of things to explore.

That sounds absolutely breathtaking, [NAME]. A capital city nestled amidst mountains with a historic old town and surrounding natural beauty. It paints such a vivid picture. What is this beautiful city called?
The city is called [CITY].
Thank you for sharing, [NAME]. [CITY] sounds like an incredible place with so much to offer. What's something unique about [CITY] that most people might not know?

Well, that it's high up in the mountains, like three thousand meters above the sea level, which is pretty hard for people that come from y- the sea level to get used to. When you s- arrive there, and you start moving, you feel the altitude. So you can get altitude sickness if you go a bit higher.
Wow, three thousand meters above sea level is quite high. That must make for some stunning views. What else makes [CITY] so special to you?

Oh, well, mm, besides that is my hometown. Uh, the, the old town is quite beautiful. It's one of the best preserved, uh, old towns in the whole world, and it was named a UNESCO, uh, World Heritage many years ago,
and also the natural beauty that is around the city.

It's wonderful that you have such pride in your hometown, [NAME]. You mentioned the old town is one of the best preserved in the world and a UNESCO World Heritage siteWhat kind of buildings or architecture can be found there that make it so special?
Well, there are a lot of churches and also monasteries and old buildings in general, libraries, hospitals, and they try to keep the, the old architecture in, as intact as possible.
So it's a nice place to visit.
That sounds fascinating, [NAME]. It's clear how much you cherish [CITY]'s rich history and architecture. What are some of your favorite things to do when you're exploring the old town?
Well, when I'm there, I like to go to,

I don't know, coffee shops that are, uh, full of art and traditional music, um, maybe live music. And I like to eat well, so I look for information about restaurants and interesting places. I like to visit old places as well as new places. And also I like to go to the park, sit down there, relax,
enjoy the weather if it's nice.
That sounds like a perfect way to experience [CITY], [NAME]. Do you have a favorite coffee shop or restaurant in the old town that you'd recommend?
Well,
mm, I cannot remember specific names right now.
Like, it's been a while. I've been living here in [HOST_COUNTRY], so it's hard for me to remember names of restaurants
right now.

It's completely understandable that it's hard to recall specific names when you've been away for a while. What kind of traditional music do you enjoy listening to in those coffee shops? I feel like we could talk about this all day, but I think that is a good place to wrap up. I really enjoyed hearing about that. It has been so nice talking with you today. I genuinely enjoyed our conversation. Thank you for that.
Thank you.
When you are ready, just head outside with your glasses on and Dara will take it from there.
All right.
Have a nice rest of your day. Bye-bye.
[chuckles] The same. Bye.
